landingHero.title: Track your training. See it add up.
landingHero.subtitle: Log workouts, follow your strength over time, and pick up where you left off — every session, every set.

logSets.title: Log every set
logSets.description: Track weight, reps, and exercises as you train.

seeProgress.title: See your progress
seeProgress.description: Weight progression charts and lifetime statistics.

reuseTemplates.title: Reuse templates
reuseTemplates.description: Save workouts as templates and start them in one tap.

followLifters.title: Follow other lifters
followLifters.description: Browse public profiles and compare your progress.

quickStartTemplates.heading: Quick Start
quickStartTemplates.startError: Failed to start session from template
quickStartTemplates.confirmTitle: Start a new session from this template?
quickStartTemplates.confirmDescription: This will start a new workout session and add all exercises from "{{templateName}}".
